  "findings": [
    "Improper fitting direction: a vent tee is installed on its back for drainage, which restricts flow and promotes blockages."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out the non-compliant vent tee.",
    "Replace with an approved drainage fitting, such as a sanitary tee or combination wye and eighth bend, oriented in the direction of flow."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using a vent tee on its back for drainage violates IPC Chapter 7 (specifically Section 706 regarding the direction of flow and selection of fittings), as it does not provide the proper sweep for gravity drainage and will lead to chronic clogging.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 704",
    "IPC 706"
  ]
}
